message:
feat(core): add Proofs of Retrievability (PoR) module (bd-3bw.4)

BLAKE3-based cryptographic storage audit: deterministic challenge
generation, compact witness proofs, full audit cycle with tracing
and global metrics. 14 tests covering challenge, proof, audit, metrics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
